records.summary: A posteroanterior chest X-ray of a 66-year-old female showing the thoracic cage, lungs, heart, and diaphragm. The image is marked with patient identifier and acquisition details.
key_observations: PA view of chest with clear visualization of bony thorax and lung fields
Marked 'R' on right shoulder indicating patient orientation

records.stage_evidence: This is a radiology report, not an image of the procedure.

ocr.verbatim:
PATIENT'S NAME:-
REFERRED BY  : DR.
DATE- 29.03.2026
AGE/SEX - 66Y/F

DIGITAL X-RAY CHEST PA VIEW

• B/L emphysematous changes.
• CP angle are not clear.
• Visualized bone are normal.
• Cardio Thoracic ratio is normal .
• Trachea is normal in position.

ADVICE :- HRCT CHEST , 2D ECHO
Please correlate clinically.

MBBS,DNB,DMRD
(RADIODIAGNOSIS)
Reg No -

records.summary: This is a typed radiology report for a digital chest X-ray in PA view. It notes bilateral emphysematous changes and advises further imaging with HRCT chest and 2D echo.
key_observations: Report is for a digital chest X-ray in PA view.
Visualized bones, cardiothoracic ratio, and trachea are normal.
Advice includes HRCT chest and 2D echo.
Report is signed by a radiologist (MBBS, DNB, DMRD).
